name: The Lion's Secret
overview: The evolving relationship between Mu Wanqing, a successful CEO, and Liu Qing, a former soldier, who marry first and fall in love later. Initially strangers, their bond deepens as they face challenges together, including family expectations that lead them on a journey to Thailand.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: The Lion's Secret | 赖猫的狮子倒影 | Zhu Yawen 朱亚文, Yang Zishan 杨子姗 | iQiyi
